name: New York University

additional_materials: Arts supplement required for Tisch School of the Arts applicants

special_considerations: Applicants apply to a specific school within NYU (Stern Business, Tisch Arts, CAS, Tandon Engineering, etc.) — acceptance rates vary dramatically by school
NYC location is central to the value proposition; industry proximity in finance, media, fashion, and tech is heavily leveraged in recruiting
One of the most internationally diverse undergraduate populations in the US (~25% international students)
Financial aid is less generous relative to peer institutions — high total cost of attendance (~$90K/yr) with moderate average aid packages

financial_aid.notes: Need-aware admissions. Meets ~60% of demonstrated need on average — less generous relative to peer institutions given high total cost (~$90K/yr). Some merit scholarships available.
